examples: She lay pliant in his arms.
She's proud and stubborn, you know, under that pliant exterior.
But will Congress really be so pliant?
Candy knew just what El Lobo, with his pliant body and immobile gaze, was up to.
Investors in Milpitas, California-based Pliant include Arcturas Capital, Divergent Ventures, Lightspeed Venture Partners and Menlo Ventures.
